description: The Morweb platform itself is intuitive and easy for our team to update, which was very important to us. I'm extremely pleased with how the final website turned out. It’s clean, modern, and a huge improvement for both our users and our internal team. I'm very grateful for [sensitive content hidden] professionalism and support throughout the entire process and would absolutely recommend Morweb to any organization looking for a well-designed, user-friendly website and a team that truly supports you along the way.
author: Andrea C.
pros: I had an excellent experience working with Morweb on our recent website redesign. Our project manager, [sensitive content hidden], was outstanding from start to finish. He was incredibly organized, responsive, personable, and patient as we worked through a fairly large project with many pages and moving parts.
cons: There was nothing we didn't like about working with Morweb or teh way our new website turned out. Their team and product are exactly what our school was looking for.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

description: Great partners with a great product. The pricing is also much more competitive than many others in the space. If ease of use is your goal MorWeb is your solution.
author: Tim D.
pros: MorWeb lives up to it's claim of being an incredibly easy to operate CMS. Even the least tech-saavy of users were up and running with a half-hour or less of training allowing me to work on important administrative tasks instead of helping to make small text or image changes. The CMS itself is also very easy to develop within.
cons: I do wish there was a version or history tool but I believe that's being worked on. (Written 7/22/21)
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

description: I love working with their team. They are a phenomenal company!
author: Jordan B.
pros: I love the Morweb support team! They are the most helpful and and responsive support team I have ever worked with. Thanks especially to [SENSITIVE CONTENT HIDDEN]
cons: The SPP website is a bit outdated and clunky, which is not user-intuitive.
author_duration: Used the software for: 2+ years

review_title: Morweb is your one stop shop for website development!
description: Morweb was so helpful to getting our new website developed. We are a smaller nonprofit that needed to create a new and improved website, as we had inherited our previous one and it was rather outdated. The team at Morweb not only helped with the functionality and organizational piece of the web design, but also with the graphic design piece, as our staff had limited abilities to contribute to the overall design of the site. The entire team at Morweb is friendly, responsive, and helpful! And now after the launch, as we work out tweaks and learn how to implement small ongoing changes, Morweb's team is always there to support us!
author: Lindsey G.
pros: Ability to explain website development/topics in laymens terms Easy to work with Budget friendly Easy to get ahold of either via the chatbot imbedded on our website or via email.
cons: No complaints, the entire team at Morweb did a phenomenal job helping support our small nonprofit create a new and improved website.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

author: Debbie B.
pros: We didn’t just need a new website — we needed a new brand. This team completely shifted the game.They didn’t just change fonts and colors. They asked real questions about who we are, how we sell, and how we want people to feel when they land on our page. The result? A site that feels intentional, confident, and aligned with our growth. Since launching, we have had quite a few “Your website looks incredible” comments. That never happened before. If you want something strategic, elevated, and actually built to convert — this is the team. Highly recommend.
cons: No Cons. They did everything we needed and more. We have had so many compliments and we couldn't be happier.
author_duration: Used the software for: 2+ years

review_title: Great Experience Building Our School Website with Morweb
description: Our overall experience with Morweb has been excellent. Their team was responsive, patient, and easy to work with throughout the process of building our school’s website. They took the time to understand what we needed and helped guide us through design and setup. The final result is a professional site that reflects our school well, and the content management system is simple enough for our staff to maintain without needing technical expertise.
author: Kristen D.
pros: What stood out most about Morweb was the level of support we received during the development of our school website. Their team was patient, responsive, and willing to walk us through the process step by step. They took the time to understand our school and helped translate that into a clean, professional website that represents our community well. The backend system is also user-friendly, which makes it much easier for our team to update pages and keep information current.
cons: None. We have had a very positive experience working with Morweb and have not encountered any significant issues.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Highly recommend Morweb for Nonprofit Organizations
description: Our new website is so much more modern and is now mobile friendly and ADA compliant which is very important to the clients we serve. I have found Morweb to be very customer focused, very responsive and easy to work with.
author: Elizabeth W.
pros: The Morweb team worked with us to build and launch our new website under a tight timeline because our old contract was expiring. The process was orderly. The team communicated with me throughout the process. As we have continued with our now completed Morweb site, editing the site/the content management system is usually easy to use and when I have challenges customer service is readily available to help.
cons: The "live" nature of editing pages and the need to select "draft" when editing so that edits are live is a bit annoying as sometimes I forget. I wish the "draft" mode for editing was the default and all edits had to be approved before they went "live." When I have made mistakes, however, the customer service team is there to help me fix them immediately if needed.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Morweb was the perfect fit for us
description: Updating our web platform for the first time since 2002. Allowed us to better engage our members and prospects in a modern, easy to use website.
author: Derrol M.
pros: Morweb is not a corporate giant. That means I get real customer service from a real person from support all the way to the CEO. You just don't see that much anymore, especially in the tech field. Also, their platform is built to support our association/not-for-profit needs including events, online directories, job module and integration with our CRM.
cons: Nothing really, if I had to nit pick it might be that sometimes response to my questions/problems is not as immediate as I would like it (but to be clear, it is almost always within 24 hours). :)
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Clean, Fresh and Easy to Use
author: Nathan S.
pros: I liked the flexibility to customize our needs and wants into a clean, fresh and easy to navigate website. We were able to share our mission, services, impact and story with our community in an easy to navigate website. They worked with us to clean up things from our old site and helped guide us through using best practices.
cons: So far nothing we don't like about the new platform for our website.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Kristin K.
pros: It is definitely easier to use than our previous platform. Once it launched, we were pleased and we liked that the Morweb staff were willing to take time to show us more about how to use it.
cons: There was a bit of transition in Morweb before our site launched and our site did take more time to launch than expected.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Dear [SENSITIVE CONTENT], I am writing to express our appreciation for the work completed by your team to ensure that our website design met our expectations. Over the course of several months we worked together to identify what we would like to see for each landing page. Your team was excellent in branding our agency and understanding our website design requirements through talking with us and independent research of similar businesses. Our project manager ensured that we had a centralized point of feedback and helped to keep both sides accountable. I particularly appreciate that everything was completed with great customer services and within the original cost constraints. We would definitely use MORWEB again and recommend you for anyone seeking website design services. Sincerely Dr. Kindred,
author: Rhonda K.
pros: Ease of development and working with staff
cons: The most difficulty was with placing a donation button on our site, but once Morweb staff understood our needs they were very responsive.
author_duration: Used the software for: 2+ years

review_title: Enhancing the Mission and Impact of Nonprofits through Web Design
description: On behalf of the Community Foundation of Sarasota County, I can strongly recommend considering Morweb for enhancing your current or future website. For nearly six months, we have worked closely with [SENSITIVE CONTENT HIDDEN] and her team to redesign and launch our new site, and we are quite satisfied with the end result. During the development phase, no matter how complex our requests or ideas were, Morweb would not hesitate to look for or develop a solution to meet our needs. Morweb’s willingness to transform our aspirations into reality was truly refreshing and a pleasure to be a part of. We chose to work with Morweb particularly due to its CMS software, which is simple to maneuver and learn, giving novices like myself the tools to make complicated updates to webpages with ease. Overall, we are proud to have worked with Morweb on this important project and look forward to continuing and strengthening this relationship.
author: Hunter C.
pros: During the development phase, no matter how complex our requests or ideas were, Morweb would not hesitate to look for or develop a solution to meet our needs. Morweb’s willingness to transform our aspirations into reality was truly refreshing and a pleasure to be a part of. We chose to work with Morweb particularly due to its CMS software, which is simple to maneuver and learn, giving novices like myself the tools to make complicated updates to webpages with ease.
cons: Cannot think of something we do not like about this software.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Review for New Precious Lamb site
description: Alix was wonderful to work with and made things really easy to learn. It was a lot of information at once during the tutorial but I love how accessible they are for questions etc.
author: Alexandra G.
pros: It is very user friendly while also looking esthetically pleasing for the user. The donation button is more accessible and I love the carousel of photos and our community partners.
cons: As of now, I haven't found any cons that I don't like about this software.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Our site is much easier to maintain and quicker to make minor adjustments.
author: Rachel W.
pros: Very easy to transfer and implement new site. [SENSITIVE CONTENT HIDDEN] and his team do great work with communicating what can/cannot be done with site implementation. The site editor is easy to use and the Morweb staff did a great job with training.
cons: Although utilized with our AMS, it does have some "bugs". The team has handled this the best it can be handled but it may be a constraint of our AMS.
author_duration: Used the software for: 2+ years

review_title: Excellent Company for Mid-Size Website Projects
description: The website Morweb designed with our team was a huge success. Not only does Morweb make highly responsive, modern websites, but the designers, and especially our Project Coordinator, are always there to help you and incorporate your suggestions and design ideas directly into the site. I would recommend them for any website development project!
author: Sal T.
pros: Automatic re-sizing of images within the CMS is great. The subtemplates are very easy and simple to use. Integration of this CMS required very little Business Process Reengineering, and implementation was very simple into our existing workflow.
cons: None! The software is great for our team that updates our site regularly.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

author: Jaclyn P.
pros: We like the ability to control the content on our website without needing assistance from Morweb. Morweb provided in-depth training on how to utilize their platform and make changes to the website as necessary. Our program information changes rapidly and we like that our team can handle the content changes without further assistance. That being said, when we have needed assistance, Morweb has responded very quickly and can fix any issues within a matter of hours. We are overall very happy with the website platform.
cons: The initial website design was long and we felt that we were not always on the same page as the design team. This is most likely due to the fact that our team does not have much experience in the web design world, but they stuck with us and were very patient. They made sure we were 100% happy with the design before moving forward with the launch which we appreciate.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: A great product and a great experience!
description: Our overall experience with Morweb has been outstanding. At every touch point, from the initial request for a demo, through the design and build phase, to the launch of the new website, everyone at Morweb truly partnered with us to patiently evaluate our needs and create a fresh website that is attractive to look at, easy to navigate for visitors and back-end users, and reflects who we are. Affordable website creation and hosting; attractive websites; and a team that's beside you every step of the way. An A-plus experience!
author: Crissie R.
pros: Morweb states their product is "a ridiculously easy nonprofit CMS platform" and it is exactly that. This product is very easy to navigate and use. It delivers a visually attractive website, that loads fast and crisp. It is also set up in a way that provides the user with the capacity to easily make changes to layout, not just content. This is a great product for non-profits and educational institutions where having a designated webmaster is not possible. With this product, you don't need a webmaster.
cons: For our purposes (a small group of public charter schools), this product has everything we need and some features that we can't currently use but aim to grow into.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Friendly, accommodating, personal. (There were a couple of minor timing issues probably due to different time zones, but nothing significant.)
author: Jane R.
pros: At time of writing, our website has been live for just a week or so. We chose Morweb because the software seemed very easy to use, intuitive and user friendly; and the options and flexibility to make changes and add various kinds of additional pages and features, seemed pretty much limitless. At this point, these suppositions definitely seem to be holding true.
cons: Too early to tell if there are any "shortfalls". Overall, this seems to be a massive improvement over any other system/platform used to date.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Working with Morweb has been a wonderful experience. As a Development manager for a non-profit, web design is not part of my acumen, but the team at Morweb showed such tremendous patience and made it much easier for even a novice to understand the process. Thanks to Rep. and his team, our organization was able to upgrade our website and make it comparable to all of the other large animal welfare organizations around the United States.
author: Taylor G.
pros: The ease of the editing tools compared to our past CMS platform is out of this world. It saves my colleagues and I time and frustration to keep our new website updated while preserving the beautiful layout and design created by Morweb.
cons: There are a few customization opportunities that Morweb doesn't currently offer, however they appear to always be working towards advancements in future releases.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: We have gone from being in the past to being up to date and relevant.
author: Nathan F.
pros: easy to navigate, user-friendly. I am a WordPress user and this platform is just as user-friendly as that. It took me a short time to get used to everything and if I have a question, the chat bubble is right there in the corner to click on and chat with customer service.
cons: I have no complaints or dislikes. everything has been great so far.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Lex C.
pros: Their customer service and support are absolutely fabulous. The software is user-friendly and extremely customizable.
cons: It would be nice to be able to easily copy elements, but I'm told they're working on this. Not a big deal!
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: We received a product that is visually appealing; an upgrade from our previous website; and shows the overall growth of our organization.
author: Sonya K.
pros: It is relatively easy to navigate and is user-friendly.
cons: There are some backend elements that require assistance from the developer to implement.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: My experience so far has been more than pleasant. They have been very accommodating.
author: Suren G.
pros: Morweb software is very flexible and offers complete control to its users. Modifications and layouts of web pages can be quickly edited.For all the features that are provided it is reasonably priced and I would recommend it to other businesses.
cons: Based on our users we have not experienced any issues with the software so far and response has been positive.
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
